entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A grain legume (Cajanus cajan) used as a primary source of dietary protein

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A grain legume (Cicer arietinum) used as a primary source of dietary protein

entities.name: DIETARY PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutrient provided by grain legumes for human populations

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of crops

entities.name: NARROW GENETIC BASE
entities.description: A lack of genetic diversity within a crop population that hinders improvement

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of crop harvested

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop yield per unit area

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by living organisms that adversely affect crop production

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by non-living factors that adversely affect crop production

entities.name: RESISTANCE/TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or recover from biotic and abiotic stresses

entities.name: CULTIVATED GENEPOOL
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available in domesticated crop varieties

entities.name: PRE-BREEDING
entities.description: The process of utilizing wild species to broaden the genetic base of crop cultivars

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Non-domesticated relatives of crops used as sources of variation

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time
